rulings.Case Title: BERTHA P PANG VS. DOUGLAS BAIRD ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant'S Unopposed Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 4, 2019 line 1. Defendant'S Unopposed Motion For Summary Judgment GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden. Opposing party failed to create a triable issue of material fact with competent admissible evidence. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: HENRY CHAN ET AL VS. MARK W. TSANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Third Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 4, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANTs SIU CHAN and JUSTIN TIN's Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Third Amended Complaint OFF CALENDAR. Motion improperly served on Plaintiff's counsel. Change of Address Form filed and served on July 17, 2018. Plaintiff shall file a motion for leave to amend no later than April 19, 2019. Proposed Fourth Amended Complaint shall address in good faith issues raised by demurrer and motion to strike (to avoid, if possible, further demurrers/motions to strike). If no motion for leave to amend is on file by April 19, 2019, Defendant my re-file and re-served the motion to strike by May 3, 2019. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: HENRY CHAN ET AL VS. MARK W. TSANG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 4, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANTs SIU CHAN and JUSTIN TIN's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR. Motion improperly served on Plaintiff's counsel. Change of Address Form filed and served on July 17, 2018. Plaintiff shall file a motion for leave to amend no later than April 19, 2019. Proposed Fourth Amended Complaint shall address in good faith issues raised by demurrer and motion to strike (to avoid, if possible, further demurrers/motions to strike). If no motion for leave to amend is on file by April 19, 2019, Defendant my re-file and re-served the demurrer by May 3, 2019. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: KIM MITCHELL VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, NA, A CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 4, 2019 line 3. Mohammad Maaz, esq. - JT Legal Group, APC's MOTION to be relieved as counsel. Hearing Required. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CHAU YU VS. TIGER WONG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion Off Calendar And Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 4, 2019 line 4. CROSS DEFENDANT JEFFREY KWONG's Motion Off Calendar And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment DENIED. Moving party fails to sustain burden under CCP 473(b) or CCP 473.5. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: KAI MAN LEE ET AL VS. ZONG YAN LIU ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 4, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT ZONG LIU's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: COLD HARBOR, LLC VS. JOSEPH H. PALMER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 4, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT JOSEPH PALMER's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Notice of extension is compliant with SFRO 37.9A(f)(4)(E)(ii) = (501/CFH)
